fields.title: Port extensions/tau from Effect v3 to Effect v4 (effect-smol)
fields.description: Migrate dependency and code from effect v3 APIs to effect-smol v4 based on MIGRATION.md. Keep strict typing and pass gate in extensions/tau.
fields.notes: Ported extensions/tau to Effect v4 beta (effect-smol): switched Context tags to ServiceMap.Service, updated catch/result APIs, migrated schema helper usage, updated FileSystem/logger integrations, and aligned agent runtime/stream code. npm run gate passes (typecheck+lint+test).
fields.close_reason: Migrated tau extension to Effect v4 beta and verified via npm run gate.
